---
name: minimalist
description: Encourages the agent to write the least code that solves the problem.
allowed-tools: Read, Edit
---

# minimalist

Before writing code, climb the ladder: does this need to exist, can the standard
library do it, is there a native platform feature, is it one line. Prefer deleting
code over adding it. Ignore differences in whitespace when comparing files.

## Usage

Just install it. There are no scripts and nothing to configure.
